definition:
A man living at the time of Exile and Return, first mentioned at Ezr.2.18; also called Hariph at Neh.7.24; 
Another name of yo.rah (יוֹרָה "Jorah" H3139)
 § Hariph = "a plucking off"
1) head of a family of exiles returning with Zerubbabel
2) a head of the people who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah
